text.title: Scope-Creep Email Language Pack Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid checklist artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is plural pronoun, required fields missing or empty.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`) or empty string
any `items[*].statement` contains banned verbs `understand`, `be familiar with`, `learn about`
